sentence: Che culiado, ¿vos venís al asado o qué?
ipa: ˈtʃe kuˈljaðo ˈbos beˈnis ˈal aˈsaðo ˈo ˈke
gloss_en: Hey dude, are you coming to the barbecue or what?
notes: Cordobés voseo 'venís' and vocative 'culiado' within Lipski's Argentine zone per lipski1994.

sentence: La calle estaba llena de gente en el centro.
ipa: ˈla ˈkaʝe eˈstaβa ˈʝena ˈde ˈxente ˈen ˈel ˈsentɾo
gloss_en: The street was full of people downtown.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll y⟩ [ʝ] 'calle llena' per lipski1994; the cordobés tonada (pretonic lengthening) is prosodic and not modelled in this stub spec.

sentence: Los zapatos azules cuestan tres mil pesos.
ipa: ˈlos saˈpatos aˈsules ˈkwestan ˈtɾes ˈmil ˈpesos
gloss_en: The blue shoes cost three thousand pesos.
notes: Seseo ⟨z⟩ [s] 'zapatos azules' per lipski1994; coda ⟨s⟩ conserved 'los'.

sentence: El perro corre por el barrio todo el día.
ipa: ˈel ˈpero ˈkore ˈpoɾ ˈel ˈbarjo ˈtoðo ˈel ˈdia
gloss_en: The dog runs around the neighborhood all day.
notes: Trill [r] for ⟨rr⟩ 'perro corre barrio' per lipski1994.

sentence: No quiero que llueva en la fiesta.
ipa: ˈno ˈkjeɾo ˈke ˈʝweba ˈen ˈla ˈfjesta
gloss_en: I don't want it to rain at the party.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llueva' per lipski1994; negation 'no quiero'.

sentence: Vení temprano y traé la bebida, aguante.
ipa: beˈni teˈmpɾano ˈi ˈtɾae ˈla beˈβiða aˈɡante
gloss_en: Come early and bring the drinks, let's go.
notes: Cordobés voseo imperatives 'vení traé' per lipski1994.

sentence: Ella lleva la llave del coche en la mano.
ipa: ˈeʝa ˈʝeba ˈla ˈʝabe ˈdel ˈkotʃe ˈen ˈla ˈmano
gloss_en: She carries the car key in her hand.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll y⟩ [ʝ] 'ella lleva llave' per lipski1994.

sentence: ¿Cómo andás, tanto tiempo sin verte?
ipa: ˈkomo aˈndas ˈtanto ˈtjempo ˈsin ˈbeɾte
gloss_en: How are you, long time no see?
notes: Central Argentine voseo 'andás' per lipski1994.

sentence: La chica cruzó la plaza con el mate en la mano.
ipa: ˈla ˈtʃika kɾuˈso ˈla ˈplasa ˈkon ˈel ˈmate ˈen ˈla ˈmano
gloss_en: The girl crossed the square with her mate in hand.
notes: Seseo ⟨z c⟩ [s] 'cruzó plaza' per lipski1994.

sentence: Comé algo antes de salir al trabajo.
ipa: koˈme ˈalɡo ˈantes ˈde saˈliɾ ˈal tɾaˈβaxo
gloss_en: Eat something before leaving for work.
notes: Voseo imperative 'comé' per lipski1994; coda ⟨s⟩ 'antes salir'.

sentence: El pollo con papas está riquísimo hoy.
ipa: ˈel ˈpoʝo ˈkon ˈpapas eˈsta riˈkisimo ˈoi
gloss_en: The chicken with potatoes is delicious today.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'pollo' per lipski1994; ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ].

sentence: Nosotros vamos a la sierra el fin de semana.
ipa: noˈsotɾos ˈbamos ˈa ˈla ˈsjera ˈel ˈfin ˈde seˈmana
gloss_en: We are going to the mountains this weekend.
notes: Coda ⟨s⟩ conserved 'nosotros vamos' per lipski1994.

sentence: Decime la verdad, ¿trajiste la guita?
ipa: deˈsime ˈla beˈɾdað tɾaˈxiste ˈla ˈɡita
gloss_en: Tell me the truth, did you bring the cash?
notes: Voseo 'decime trajiste' per lipski1994.

sentence: No seas malo, prestame la bici un rato.
ipa: ˈno ˈseas ˈmalo pɾeˈstame ˈla ˈbisi ˈun ˈrato
gloss_en: Don't be mean, lend me the bike for a while.
notes: Voseo 'seas prestame' per lipski1994; negation 'no seas'.

sentence: Mañana llega mi primo desde Buenos Aires.
ipa: maˈɲana ˈʝeɣa ˈmi ˈpɾimo ˈdesde ˈbwenos ˈajɾes
gloss_en: Tomorrow my cousin arrives from Buenos Aires.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'mañana' documented in the baseline per lipski1994.

sentence: La feria del centro abre todos los domingos.
ipa: ˈla ˈfeɾja ˈdel ˈsentɾo ˈabɾe ˈtoðos ˈlos doˈminɡos
gloss_en: The downtown market opens every Sunday.
notes: Coverage of the seseo baseline per lipski1994; coda ⟨s⟩ 'todos los'.

sentence: Poné la pava que ya tomamos unos mates.
ipa: poˈne ˈla ˈpaba ˈke ˈʝa toˈmamos ˈunos ˈmates
gloss_en: Put the kettle on, let's have some mates.
notes: Voseo imperative 'poné' per lipski1994; sandhi 'que ya'.

sentence: El río Suquía baja crecido esta semana.
ipa: ˈel ˈrio suˈkia ˈbaxa kɾeˈsiðo ˈesta seˈmana
gloss_en: The Suquía river is running high this week.
notes: Local hydronym in a cordobés frame per lipski1994; coda ⟨s⟩ 'esta'.

sentence: ¿Querés que te lleve hasta la terminal?
ipa: keˈɾes ˈke ˈte ˈʝebe ˈasta ˈla teɾmiˈnal
gloss_en: Do you want me to take you to the bus station?
notes: Voseo 'querés' per lipski1994; yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'lleve'.

sentence: Salimos a caminar cuando baje el calor.
ipa: saˈlimos ˈa kamiˈnaɾ ˈkwando ˈbaxe ˈel kaˈloɾ
gloss_en: We'll go for a walk when the heat drops.
notes: Coda ⟨s⟩ conserved 'salimos' per lipski1994.
